channel.title: UX Writing on Devika Jallegowda
channel.description: Recent content in UX Writing on Devika Jallegowda

item.title: Taskly: Content-led Onboarding
item.description:
I designed and wrote onboarding documentation for Taskly — a productivity SaaS tool — to help users:

  • Understand the product’s value in < 5 minutes
  • Complete their first setup flow
  • Reduce reliance on support tickets

What I Delivered

  • Step-by-step walkthrough
  • Empty state and tooltip copy
  • Onboarding audit and lifecycle email copy
